back-end/src/main/java/com/example/schmi.general_idea: Enable Spring Data Envers repositories to support auditing and revision history for JPA entities.
Remove direct repository injection from controller to enforce service layer encapsulation.
back-end/src/main/java/com/example/schmi.human_impl: Removed PatrimonioRepository field and constructor argument; controller now only depends on PatrimonioService.

back-end/src/main/java/com/example/schmi.general_idea: Restrict CORS origins to specific trusted domains instead of allowing all.
back-end/src/main/java/com/example/schmi.human_impl: Changed @CrossOrigin(origins = "*") to specific localhost and Vercel URLs.

back-end/src/main/java/com/example/schmi.general_idea: Add OpenAPI/Swagger annotations for API documentation and security requirements.
back-end/src/main/java/com/example/schmi.human_impl: Added @Tag, @Operation, and @SecurityRequirement annotations to class and methods.

back-end/src/main/java/com/example/schmi.general_idea: Replace unbounded list retrieval with paginated and filtered results.
back-end/src/main/java/com/example/schmi.human_impl: Replaced getAllPatrimonios() with listar() accepting Pageable and filter params.

back-end/src/main/java/com/example/schmi.general_idea: Add endpoints to retrieve audit history for assets using Hibernate Envers.
Enforce role-based access control for sensitive operations like deletion.
Add endpoints to generate PDF reports for inventory and history.
back-end/src/main/java/com/example/schmi.human_impl: Added /relatorio and /relatorio-historico endpoints writing PDF to HttpServletResponse.

back-end/src/main/java/com/example/schmi.general_idea: Modernize imports by replacing wildcard imports with explicit ones.
back-end/src/main/java/com/example/schmi.human_impl: Replaced import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.* with specific annotation imports.

back-end/src/main/java/com/example/schmi.general_idea: Rename service methods to follow consistent naming conventions.
back-end/src/main/java/com/example/schmi.human_impl: Renamed update() to updatePatrimonio() and delete() to deletePatrimonio() in service calls.

back-end/src/main/java/com/example/schmi.general_idea: Add dependency for Swagger/OpenAPI documentation generation.
Add dependency for Spring Security pre-authorization annotations.
Add dependency for Spring Data pagination support.
back-end/src/main/java/com/example/schmi.human_impl: Added imports for org.springframework.data.domain.Page, PageRequest, Pageable, Sort, and PageableDefault.

back-end/src/main/java/com/example/schmi.general_idea: Add dependency for Servlet API to handle HTTP response output.
Rename the field 'numeroEtiqueta' to 'etiqueta' for brevity or consistency.
Add a new required 'setor' field to the record.
Add a new required 'status' field to the record.
Add a new 'valor' field of type BigDecimal to the record.
Add import for java.math.BigDecimal to support the new field type.
Replace Spring HATEOAS RepresentationModel inheritance with java.io.Serializable to remove REST link generation dependency from the entity.
Enable Hibernate Envers auditing for the entity to track historical changes.
Correct serialVersionUID field naming and add @Serial annotation for Java 14+ compliance.
Rename the unique identifier field from numeroEtiqueta to etiqueta.
back-end/src/main/java/com/example/schmi.human_impl: private String numeroEtiqueta -> private String etiqueta

back-end/src/main/java/com/example/schmi.general_idea: Add a new setor field to the model.
Add a new status field with a default value of 'ativo'.
Add a new valor field of type BigDecimal to the model.
Refactor imports to use explicit specific imports instead of wildcards and add new required imports.
back-end/src/main/java/com/example/schmi.human_impl: import jakarta.persistence.* -> explicit imports; add Serializable, BigDecimal, Audited

back-end/src/main/java/com/example/schmi.general_idea: Extend the repository interface to implement RevisionRepository to enable auditing and versioning of entity changes.
Introduce Page and Pageable imports to support paginated query results instead of returning full lists.
Add Query and Param imports to enable custom JPQL queries with named parameters.
Remove imports for List, Optional, and other types no longer used after refactoring the repository methods.
Remove simple derived query methods (findByMarca, etc.) in favor of a single complex custom query method.
Implement a new custom JPQL query method using text blocks to support complex filtering by status and search terms with pagination.
back-end/src/main/java/com/example/schmi.human_impl: @Query(""" SELECT p FROM PatrimonioModel p WHERE ... """) Page<PatrimonioModel> buscarComFiltro(...)

back-end/src/main/java/com/example/schmi.general_idea: Removed Spring HATEOAS link generation from service methods to decouple service logic from REST representation concerns.
back-end/src/main/java/com/example/schmi.human_impl: Removed imports for WebMvcLinkBuilder and calls to linkTo/methodOn in getAllPatrimonios, getOnePatrimonio, etc.

back-end/src/main/java/com/example/schmi.general_idea: Added @Transactional annotation to the service class and specific methods to ensure proper transaction management.
back-end/src/main/java/com/example/schmi.human_impl: Added @Transactional to class and @Transactional(readOnly = true) to read methods.

back-end/src/main/java/com/example/schmi.general_idea: Refactored list retrieval to use Spring Data Pageable for efficient database-level pagination instead of loading all records.
back-end/src/main/java/com/example/schmi.human_impl: Changed return type from List<PatrimonioModel> to Page<PatrimonioModel> and updated method signature to accept Pageable.

back-end/src/main/java/com/example/schmi.general_idea: Injected EntityManager to enable Hibernate Envers AuditReader for retrieving historical data.
Implemented method to retrieve paginated general audit history for all assets, handling deleted records by fetching previous state.
back-end/src/main/java/com/example/schmi.human_impl: Added getHistoricoGeral method using AuditReaderFactory and manual pagination/filtering.

back-end/src/main/java/com/example/schmi.general_idea: Implemented method to retrieve the full revision history for a specific asset ID.
back-end/src/main/java/com/example/schmi.human_impl: Added getHistorico method using reader.getRevisions and reader.find.

back-end/src/main/java/com/example/schmi.general_idea: Added functionality to export the current list of assets to a PDF report using iText.
back-end/src/main/java/com/example/schmi.human_impl: Added exportarPatrimoniosPdf method creating a PdfPTable with asset details.

back-end/src/main/java/com/example/schmi.general_idea: Added functionality to export the audit history of assets to a PDF report using iText.
back-end/src/main/java/com/example/schmi.human_impl: Added exportarHistoricoParaPdf method creating a PdfPTable with audit trail details.

back-end/src/main/java/com/example/schmi.general_idea: Added imports for iText library classes to support PDF generation.
back-end/src/main/java/com/example/schmi.human_impl: Added imports for com.lowagie.text.* and com.lowagie.text.pdf.*.

back-end/src/main/java/com/example/schmi.general_idea: Added standard Java utility imports required for the new features (Date, Locale, Stream, etc.).
back-end/src/main/java/com/example/schmi.human_impl: Added imports for java.util.Date, java.util.Locale, java.util.stream.Stream, etc.

back-end/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent from 4.0.2 to 3.4.3 to align with Java 21 ecosystem and modern Spring features.
Update the project's Java version property from 17 to 21 to enforce JDK 21 compilation standards.
Add spring-boot-starter-web to enable web MVC capabilities, replacing the removed webmvc starter.
Include the PostgreSQL JDBC driver for database connectivity.
Add spring-boot-starter-data-jpa to enable JPA data access features.
Include H2 in-memory database for development and testing purposes.
Add spring-boot-starter-security to enable Spring Security configuration.
Add JJWT API dependency for JWT token handling.
Add JJWT implementation dependency for runtime JWT processing.
Add JJWT Jackson dependency for JSON serialization support in JWTs.
Add springdoc-openapi-starter-webmvc-ui to enable Swagger UI documentation.
Add Hibernate Envers for entity auditing and versioning.
Add Spring Data Envers to integrate Hibernate Envers with Spring Data repositories.
Add OpenPDF library for generating PDF documents.
Add spring-boot-starter-validation for Bean Validation support.
Add Project Lombok to reduce boilerplate code in Java entities.
Add spring-boot-starter-test for standard testing dependencies.
Add spring-security-test for testing security configurations.
Set Maven compiler source and target to 21 to ensure Java 21 bytecode generation.
Pin Lombok version to 1.18.30 in both dependencies and annotation processor paths.
Remove spring-boot-starter-hateoas as it is no longer used in the application.
Remove spring-boot-starter-webmvc in favor of spring-boot-starter-web.
Remove spring-boot-devtools as it is no longer needed or desired.
Remove spring-boot-starter-hateoas-test dependency.
Remove spring-boot-starter-validation-test dependency.
Remove spring-boot-starter-webmvc-test dependency.
Remove spring-boot-starter-data-jpa-test dependency.
Remove explicit spring-boot-maven-plugin configuration excluding Lombok, relying on defaults.

.gitignore.general_idea: Ignore the Maven wrapper properties file to prevent tracking generated build configuration.
Ignore the auto-generated HELP.md file from the backend directory.

back-end/src/main/resources/application..general_idea: Removed hardcoded database connection details to allow configuration via environment variables or external config.
back-end/src/main/resources/application..human_impl: Removed spring.datasource.url, username, and password lines.

back-end/src/main/resources/application..general_idea: Disabled the Open Session in View pattern to improve performance and prevent lazy loading issues in production.
Configured Hibernate Envers to store data at the time of deletion for audit trails.
Set the default timezone for Jackson JSON serialization to America/Sao_Paulo.
Enabled debug logging for Spring Security to aid in troubleshooting authentication and authorization issues.
Configured the server port to use an environment variable with a fallback default.
Enabled HATEOAS resolution for SpringDoc API documentation.
Explicitly set the path for the OpenAPI v3 documentation endpoint.
Explicitly set the path for the Swagger UI interface.

back-end/src/main/resources/static/scrip.general_idea: Rename the JavaScript object property from 'numeroEtiqueta' to 'etiqueta' to align with backend model changes.

front-end/index.html.general_idea: Replace the default Vite favicon with a custom hospital icon.
Change the browser tab title from the generic Vite template to the application name.

front-end/package-lock.json.general_idea: Add Vercel Speed Insights for performance monitoring.
Add jwt-decode for decoding JWT tokens.
Add React Toastify for toast notifications.
Add Autoprefixer for CSS vendor prefixing.
Add Tailwind CSS for utility-first styling.
Update Rollup native binaries to version 4.59.0.
Add react-toastify for UI notification toasts.
Add jwt-decode for decoding JWT tokens.
Add tailwindcss for utility-first CSS styling.
